mapper.sql: (d.del_flag IS NULL OR d.del_flag = '' OR d.del_flag = '0')

select d.delivery_id, d.delivery_no, d.hospital_id, d.warehouse_name, d.order_id, d.order_no, d.zs_order_id, d.ref_order_source, d.src_order_supplier_id, d.src_order_supplier_name, d.src_order_warehouse_id, d.src_order_warehouse_name, d.src_order_dept_id, d.src_order_dept_name, d.zs_customer_id, d.zs_jsfs, d.supplier_id, d.spd_supplier_id, d.spd_tenant_id, d.spd_ref_no, d.delivery_amount, d.delivery_status, d.delivery_person, d.delivery_address, d.expected_delivery_date, d.invoice_no, d.invoice_amount, d.invoice_date, d.order_date, d.audit_status, d.audit_by, d.audit_time, d.audit_remark, d.remark, d.create_by, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(d.create_by_name_snapshot), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(creator.real_name), ''), d.create_by) as create_by_display, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(d.audit_by_name_snapshot), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(auditor.real_name), ''), d.audit_by) as audit_by_display, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(dp.real_name), ''), d.delivery_person) as delivery_person_display, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.create_by_name_snapshot, d.audit_by_name_snapshot, d.unaudit_by_name_snapshot, d.del_flag, d.del_time, d.del_by, d.tenant_id, (select count(1) from scm_delivery_download_log dl where dl.delivery_id = concat(d.delivery_id, '')) as download_log_count, h.hospital_name, s.company_name as supplier_name from scm_delivery d left join scm_hospital h on d.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id left join sys_user creator on (creator.del_flag = '0' or creator.del_flag is null or creator.del_flag = '') and (creator.login_name = d.create_by or creator.user_name = d.create_by or cast(creator.user_id as char) = d.create_by) left join sys_user auditor on (auditor.del_flag = '0' or auditor.del_flag is null or auditor.del_flag = '') and (auditor.login_name = d.audit_by or auditor.user_name = d.audit_by or cast(auditor.user_id as char) = d.audit_by) left join sys_user dp on (dp.del_flag = '0' or dp.del_flag is null or dp.del_flag = '') and (dp.login_name = d.delivery_person or dp.user_name = d.delivery_person or cast(dp.user_id as char) = d.delivery_person)
mapper.select: where d.delivery_no = #{deliveryNo} and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '' or d.del_flag = '0')

select count(distinct d.delivery_id) from scm_delivery d where (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '' or d.del_flag = '0') and ( d.order_id = #{orderId} or exists ( select 1 from scm_delivery_detail dd inner join scm_order_detail od on od.detail_id = dd.order_detail_id where dd.delivery_id = d.delivery_id and od.order_id = #{orderId} and (dd.del_flag is null or dd.del_flag = '' or dd.del_flag = '0') ) or exists ( select 1 from scm_order_detail_delivery_rel r where r.order_id = cast(#{orderId} as char) and r.delivery_id = cast(d.delivery_id as char) ) )
mapper.insert: insert into scm_delivery( delivery_no, hospital_id, warehouse_name, order_id, order_no, zs_order_id, ref_order_source, src_order_supplier_id, src_order_supplier_name, src_order_warehouse_id, src_order_warehouse_name, src_order_dept_id, src_order_dept_name, zs_customer_id, zs_jsfs, spd_supplier_id, spd_tenant_id, spd_ref_no, supplier_id, delivery_amount, delivery_status, delivery_person, delivery_address, expected_delivery_date, invoice_no, invoice_amount, invoice_date, order_date, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, remark, create_by, create_by_name_snapshot, del_flag, create_time )values( #{deliveryNo}, #{hospitalId}, #{warehouse}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{zsOrderId}, #{refOrderSource}, #{srcOrderSupplierId}, #{srcOrderSupplierName}, #{srcOrderWarehouseId}, #{srcOrderWarehouseName}, #{srcOrderDeptId}, #{srcOrderDeptName}, #{zsCustomerId}, #{zsJsfs}, #{spdSupplierId}, #{spdTenantId}, #{spdRefNo}, #{supplierId}, #{deliveryAmount}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryPerson}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{expectedDeliveryDate}, #{invoiceNo}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{invoiceDate}, #{orderDate}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createByNameSnapshot}, '0', sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update scm_delivery
delivery_no = #{deliveryNo},
hospital_id = #{hospitalId},
hospital_id = NULL,
warehouse_name = #{warehouse}, order_id = #{orderId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, zs_order_id = #{zsOrderId},
ref_order_source = #{refOrderSource},
ref_order_source = NULL,
src_order_supplier_id = #{srcOrderSupplierId}, src_order_supplier_name = #{srcOrderSupplierName}, src_order_warehouse_id = #{srcOrderWarehouseId}, src_order_warehouse_name = #{srcOrderWarehouseName}, src_order_dept_id = #{srcOrderDeptId}, src_order_dept_name = #{srcOrderDeptName}, zs_customer_id = #{zsCustomerId}, zs_jsfs = #{zsJsfs}, spd_supplier_id = #{spdSupplierId}, spd_tenant_id = #{spdTenantId}, spd_ref_no = #{spdRefNo},
supplier_id = #{supplierId},
supplier_id = NULL,
delivery_amount = #{deliveryAmount}, delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus}, delivery_person = #{deliveryPerson}, delivery_address = #{deliveryAddress}, expected_delivery_date = #{expectedDeliveryDate}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}, invoice_amount = #{invoiceAmount}, invoice_date = #{invoiceDate}, order_date = #{orderDate}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_by_name_snapshot = #{auditByNameSnapshot}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where delivery_id = #{deliveryId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0')

update scm_delivery set audit_status = '0', audit_by = null, audit_time = null, audit_remark = null, delivery_status = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, unaudit_by_name_snapshot = #{unauditByNameSnapshot}, update_time = sysdate() where delivery_id = #{deliveryId} and audit_status = '1' and (delivery_status is null or delivery_status not in ('2', '3')) and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0')

update scm_delivery set del_flag = '2', del_time = sysdate(), del_by = #{delBy}, delivery_no = concat(left(ifnull(delivery_no, ''), 22), 'D', delivery_id) where delivery_id = #{deliveryId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag = '' or del_flag = '0')
